taskPreset.title: Create AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md Update Task
taskPreset.description: Queue a structured AGENTS.md maintenance task (with CLAUDE.md redirect) for one project, with optional MonoSpecs child-repo coverage.

panel.projectHint: The maintenance session will be created inside the selected project.
panel.scopeHint: MonoSpecs roots can stay at the root AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md or include child-repo AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md files in one run.
panel.scopeLoadFailed: Couldn't load the MonoSpecs repository list. You can still run the root-only scope.
panel.taskNameHint: Optional. Leave empty to use the preset default title for this queued maintenance session.
